tournament.name: Bharat Pro Circuit League Season 1
tournament.rulebook:
BLAST — 12 teams (short overview)

STRUCTURE
• Two groups of 6, BO1 round robin (everyone in-group plays everyone once).
• Order: Groups → Last Chance → Play-In (middle knockout, then crossover) → Main playoffs (QF → SF → Final).

WHO ADVANCES FROM GROUPS (BY IN-GROUP FINISH)
• 1st in each group → Main semifinals.
• 2nd in each group → Crossover Play-In: each plays one Last Chance finalist for a main quarterfinal slot.
• 3rd–4th in each group → Middle Play-In knockout only (paired across groups — see below).
• 5th–6th in each group → Side path only: start Last Chance (four entrants total).

LAST CHANCE (4 TEAMS)
Group A #5, #6 and Group B #5, #6 contest a single-elimination Last Chance until two finalists advance. Those two each meet a crossover Play-In matchup (paired against that group’s #2, not against each other in this round).

MIDDLE PLAY-IN — #3 / #4 (4 TEAM → 2)
The middle band is seeded Group A #3, Group B #3, Group A #4, Group B #4. One knockout round is played with cross pairing: A3 ↔ B4 and B3 ↔ A4. The two winners proceed to main quarterfinals (with cross-fed opponents — see playoffs).

CROSS PLAY-IN — #2 vs LAST CHANCE FINALIST (2 QUALIFIERS)
Group A #2 vs one Last Chance finalist · Group B #2 vs the other Last Chance finalist — two winners qualify to main quarterfinals.

MAIN PLAYOFFS
• Quarterfinals: Middle Play-ins winners vs Crossover play-ins winners.
• Semifinals: Group A #1 vs one QF winner · Group B #1 vs the other QF winner.
• Final: Semi winners.
tournament.description:
Welcome to BPC League Season 1, where consistency meets clutch performance and every team gets a real shot at the title. Built on a fast-paced GSL-style format with round-robin BO1 groups, playoffs, and last-chance pathways, this isn’t a one-and-done tournament—it’s a true test of adaptability and resilience.

Whether you dominate early or fight your way back through play-ins, every squad has a fighting chance to rise. One good draft, one perfect teamfight, one moment of brilliance can turn the tide of your entire run. From calculated strategies to high-pressure deciders, BPC League is designed to reward teams that evolve, endure, and execute when it matters most.

Every game counts. Every path is open. Earn your place, and prove you belong at the top.

announcements.body:
Registrations are now open — closing on 20th May !!
Don’t miss your chance to compete.
All registrants to ensure they join the discord server (mandatory) for completion of approval process , and to stay updated with all information regarding the tournament.

Registrations are now closed!
60 players have registered for this season, stay tuned for draft updates, captains will be announced very soon.
Captains have been officially announced. Check discord announcements!
